narrative:
Beavercreek 009 (precinct in Greene County) has 751 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points.
